promise: Before you import or export, know what is missing. Turn a messy trade idea into an evidence-backed readiness packet that shows what is known, what is missing, which claims are blocked, and what review is required before moving forward.
proof_boundary: Trade Readiness Copilot organizes import/export evidence and blockers. It does not provide legal, customs, tariff, tax, CFIA, supplier, buyer, compliance, shipment, or launch advice.

public_privacy_controls.retention_notice: delete or expire after public quick check
public_privacy_controls.review_boundary: PIPEDA/OWASP/NIST references are control prompts, not legal or security certification claims.

levels: Level 1 public free tool - no login, limited PDF upload, draft PDF, auto-delete/delete controls
Level 2 free account - saved history and workspace
Level 3 Pro - more packets and review workflows
Level 5 Enterprise/private AI - customer-managed or private hosted model routing
